common.networkError: Connection lost. Check your network and try again.

hero.title: Your address, finally
hero.subtitle: Create a standardized digital address in under 2 minutes. Assisted geolocation, official PDF document and QR code — share a reliable location, anywhere in Cameroon.

how.title: Three steps to a reliable address
how.subtitle: No more "behind the church" or "after the junction". findMe turns your location into an address usable by couriers, emergency services and institutions.
how.step1Desc: Enable geolocation or drag the marker on the map to pinpoint your home precisely.
how.step2Desc: Country, city, neighborhood, street and a photo of the building. A guided form, saved automatically.
how.step3Desc: Download your official document with a QR code, or share the link. Your address becomes universal.

demo.title: Built for mobile, designed for trust
demo.subtitle: Over 80% of our users come from a smartphone. Every screen is optimized to be fast, readable and accessible.

testimonials.title: Addresses that change daily life
testimonials.q1: My customers finally find me on the first try. My deliveries doubled.
testimonials.q2: I was able to send my exact address to the ambulance. Minutes mattered.
testimonials.q3: The API integration helped us make last-mile delivery reliable.

finalCta.title: Ready to become findable?
finalCta.subtitle: Join more than 25,000 users and create your digital address for free.

footer.tagline: The digital addressing platform that makes every place findable in Africa.

auth.brandTitle: A reliable address, one click away.
auth.brandSubtitle: Create your findMe account and generate standardized digital addresses, ready for delivery and services.
auth.signinSubtitle: Sign in to manage your addresses.
auth.signupSubtitle: Free, no credit card. Ready in 30 seconds.
auth.forgotSubtitle: Enter your email and we'll send you a reset link.
auth.resetSubtitle: Choose a secure password for your account.
auth.pwHint: 8 characters min., one uppercase and one digit.
auth.forgotSent: If an account exists, a reset email has been sent.
auth.resetSuccess: Password reset. You can now sign in.

dashboard.title: My addresses
dashboard.subtitle: Manage up to 4 digital addresses.
dashboard.emptyDesc: Create your first standardized digital address in under 2 minutes.
dashboard.maxReached: You have reached the limit of 4 addresses. Delete one to add a new address.
dashboard.deleteDesc: This action is irreversible. The associated document and QR code will no longer be valid.

address.geoError: Geolocation unavailable. Move the marker manually.
address.geoDenied: Permission denied. Drag the marker on the map.
address.mapHint: Drag the marker to fine-tune your exact position.
address.photoHint: JPG or PNG, automatically compressed (max ~1 MB).
address.missingPosition: Please set a position before continuing.

contact.title: Contact support
contact.subtitle: A question or a technical issue? Write to us, we reply within 24h.
contact.name: Your name
contact.success: Message sent! Our team will get back to you shortly.
